title: omphalogramma minus
intro: Omphalogramma minus, also known as the lesser umbilicus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Omphalogramma minus include its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting the bioactive compounds using solvents, and it is often used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of the world.
